threats.title: IDOR (Insecure Direct Object Reference)
threats.description: If the system doesn't properly validate user-supplied identifiers (e.g., object IDs, file names) when accessing resources, attackers could potentially manipulate these identifiers to gain unauthorized access to privileged resources or escalate their privileges.
threats.attack_vector: Exploiting vulnerabilities in the application logic that allows attackers to bypass authorization checks and access resources they shouldn't have access to.
mitigations: Implement robust authorization checks for all data access requests.
Use indirect object references (e.g., GUIDs) instead of direct object references.
Enforce strict access control policies and regularly review user permissions.

threats.title: Data Injection via Unvalidated Input
threats.description: If the system doesn't properly validate and sanitize user input, attackers could inject malicious code (e.g., SQL injection, XSS) into data fields, leading to data corruption, unauthorized access, or system compromise.
threats.attack_vector: Malicious input provided through forms, APIs, or other user interfaces that bypasses input validation.
mitigations: Implement robust input validation and sanitization techniques.
Use parameterized queries or prepared statements to prevent SQL injection.
Employ a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to filter malicious traffic.

threats.title: Weak Password Policy Bypass
threats.description: Attackers could potentially bypass the standard password policy through brute-force attacks, dictionary attacks, or credential stuffing, especially if the password policy is overly permissive or lacks multi-factor authentication. This could lead to unauthorized access to user accounts.
threats.attack_vector: Brute-force attacks, dictionary attacks, credential stuffing targeting the authentication service.
mitigations: Implement a strong password policy with complexity requirements (length, character types).
Enforce multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all user accounts.
Implement rate limiting and account lockout policies to mitigate brute-force attacks.

threats.title: Exposure of Sensitive Data Due to Lack of Access Controls
threats.description: Without defined access controls and data classification, sensitive data could be exposed to unauthorized users or systems. This could occur through misconfigured permissions, insecure APIs, or vulnerabilities in the application logic.
threats.attack_vector: Unauthorized access to data due to insufficient or misconfigured access controls.
mitigations: Implement strict access control policies based on the principle of least privilege.
Conduct regular data classification and sensitivity assessments.
Implement data loss prevention (DLP) measures.

threats.title: Resource Exhaustion via Malicious Requests
threats.description: Attackers could flood the system with a large volume of requests, overwhelming its resources and causing a denial of service. This could be amplified through techniques like DDoS attacks.
threats.attack_vector: Large volume of requests designed to exhaust server resources.
mitigations: Implement rate limiting and throttling mechanisms.
Utilize a Content Delivery Network (CDN) to distribute traffic.
Employ DDoS mitigation services.

gaps: Lack of specific controls for vulnerability scanning and patch management (V7, V9, V10)
Limited coverage of advanced security controls within the ASVS framework
priorities: High - IDOR and Data Injection (Severity High) - Requires immediate remediation due to potential for widespread impact.
Medium - Weak Password Policy Bypass (Severity High) - Requires prompt remediation to mitigate credential compromise risks.

dfd_mermaid:
flowchart TB

    %% Styling
    classDef external fill:#e1f5fe,stroke:#0277bd,stroke-width:2px
    classDef process fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#2e7d32,stroke-width:2px
    classDef datastore fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ef6c00,stroke-width:2px
    classDef threat fill:#ffebee,stroke:#c62828,stroke-width:3px

    subgraph External["External Entities"]
        user[("👤 User")]
        admin[("👔 Admin")]
        external_api[("🌐 External API")]
    end

    subgraph TrustBoundary["Trust Boundary"]
        subgraph Frontend["Frontend Layer"]
            web_app["🖥️ Web Application"]
        end

        subgraph Backend["Backend Layer"]
            api_gateway["🚪 API Gateway"]
            auth_service["🔐 Auth Service"]
            core_api["⚙️ Core API"]
        end

        subgraph Data["Data Layer"]
            database[("💾 Database")]
            cache[("⚡ Cache")]
        end
    end

    %% Data Flows
    user -->|"🔒 HTTPS"| web_app
    admin -->|"🔒 HTTPS + MFA"| web_app
    web_app -->|"🔒 API Calls"| api_gateway
    api_gateway -->|"🔒 Auth Check"| auth_service
    api_gateway -->|"🔒 Business Logic"| core_api
    auth_service -->|"🔒 User Data"| database
    core_api -->|"🔒 CRUD"| database
    core_api -->|"⚠️ Session"| cache
    core_api -->|"🔒 External Call"| external_api

    %% Apply Styles
    class user,admin,external_api external
    class web_app,api_gateway,auth_service,core_api process
    class database,cache datastore
    class api_gateway,auth_service,core_api threat

semgrep.config_file:
rules:
- id: security-custom-1
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: IDOR (Insecure Direct Object Reference)
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-269
    owasp: A01:2021
    threat_category: Elevation of Privilege
  patterns:
  - pattern: eval($X)
  - pattern: exec($X)
  severity: ERROR
- fix: cursor.execute($QUERY, (params,))
  id: security-custom-2
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Data Injection via Unvalidated Input
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-89
    owasp: A03:2021
    threat_category: Tampering
  patterns:
  - pattern: cursor.execute($QUERY)
    pattern-not: cursor.execute($QUERY, $PARAMS)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-3
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Weak Password Policy Bypass
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-287
    owasp: A07:2021
    threat_category: Spoofing
  patterns:
  - pattern: password = "..."
  - pattern: secret = "..."
  - pattern: api_key = "..."
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-4
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Exposure of Sensitive Data Due to Lack of Access Controls
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-200
    owasp: A01:2021
    threat_category: Information Disclosure
  patterns:
  - pattern: print($SENSITIVE)
  - pattern: console.log($SENSITIVE)
  severity: ERROR
- id: security-custom-5
  languages:
  - python
  - javascript
  - typescript
  message: Resource Exhaustion via Malicious Requests
  metadata:
    category: security
    confidence: HIGH
    cwe: CWE-400
    owasp: A05:2021
    threat_category: Denial of Service
  patterns:
  - pattern: eval($X)
  - pattern: exec($X)
  severity: ERROR
